summary: Completed comprehensive verification testing of modernized García Sellerie Garniture website. All requested features working perfectly including navigation, gallery filters, contact form, framer-motion animations, and design elements.
passed_tests: Page loads correctly with framer-motion animations
Navigation works with smooth scrolling to all sections (accueil, savoir-faire, engagement, galerie, contact)
Gallery filter buttons work perfectly (Tous, Automobile, Moto, Nautisme, Mobilier)
Contact form submission integrates with backend successfully and shows success message
All sections render correctly (hero, services, engagement, gallery, contact, footer)
Noise texture overlay present for premium design
Service cards in Bento grid layout render correctly (Automobile, Moto, Nautisme, Mobilier)
Mobile navigation menu opens and functions properly
